memoryArtifacts.headline: Phillippe Gibbons
memoryArtifacts.description:
A Family Group prepared by Alice Cheney Ricks, states that Phillippe Gibbons married a Henry Allarde.  This seems very probable as her sister, Elizabeth, married a Richard Allarde.
Further research ne …

zh.Biddenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特比登登
zh.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Gibbon於1569年3月5日在英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登受洗時，她的父親Henry Gibbon34歲，母親Mary27歲。她於1586年1月9日與Henry Allarde在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特比登登。

zh-hans.Biddenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特比登登
zh-hans.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Gibbon于1569年3月5日在英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登受洗时，她的父亲Henry Gibbon34岁，母亲Mary27岁。她于1586年1月9日与Henry Allarde在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰肯特比登登。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

variants.name: Gibbons
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Gibbon was christened on 5 March 1569, in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Gibbon, was 34 and her mother, Mary, was 27. She married Henry Allarde on 9 January 1586, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She was buried in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Gibbon a été baptisée le 5 mars 1569, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Gibbon, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Allarde le 9 janvier 1586, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elleenterrée à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Gibbon am 5. März 1569 in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Gibbon 34 und ihre Mutter Mary 27. Sie hat am 9. Januar 1586 in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Henry Allarde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie wurde in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Gibbon è stato battezzato il 5 marzo 1569 nel Rolvenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Gibbon, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Henry Allarde il 9 gennaio 1586, nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Fu sepolta a Biddenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Biddenden, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントビッドエンデン
ja.Benenden, Kent, England: イギリスケントベンエンデン
ja.Rolvenden, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントロルベンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Phillipa Gibbonが1569年3月5日にイギリスイギリスケントロルベンデンで洗礼を受けた時，父Henry Gibbonは34歳，母Maryは27歳であった。1586年1月9日にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンでHenry Allardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスケントビッドエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Gibbon(이)가 1569년 3월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 롤븐든에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Gibbon(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1586년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 Henry Allarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비데든에 묻혔다.

pt.5 Mar 1569–30 January 1624: 5 de março de 1569–30 de janeiro de 1624
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Gibbon foi batizada em 5 de março de 1569, em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Gibbon, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Allarde em 9 de janeiro de 1586, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Gibbon была крещена 5 марта 1569 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Gibbon было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Allarde 9 января 1586 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.5 Mar 1569–30 January 1624: 5 de marzo de 1569–30 de enero de 1624
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillipa Gibbon se bautizó el 5 de marzo de 1569, en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Gibbon, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Henry Allarde el 9 de enero de 1586, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Fue sepultada en Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
